title: Monthly Newsletter - Canada.ca
content:
Access the latest and past issues of the Canada's food guide monthly newsletter.

## Read the latest issue

### Reducing sodium without losing flavour
Cooking at home gives you more control and helps limit sodium in your meals.
- Recipe:       baked fish and chips
- New       food label
- Make       your own spice mixes
- Fresh       and dried herbs to boost flavour
- Seasoning       with little to no added sodium
- Translated       food guide snapshot in Dene
